response.original_title: How to Cancel Norton LifeLock Subscription ?
response.overview: To cancel your Norton LifeLock subscription, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 first log into your Norton account using a web browser, not the mobile app, as the app often hides cancellation options, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 once logged in, navigate to the "Subscriptions" or "My Billing" page and look for "Turn Off Auto-Renewal" or "Cancel Subscription," 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 if you find these buttons, click through, confirm your cancellation, and save a screenshot of the confirmation page along with any confirmation email, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 however, many Norton LifeLock users report that the online cancellation button is frequently missing, grayed out, or simply does nothing when clicked, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 if this happens, you must call Norton customer support directly at 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 to complete your cancellation, 1⟅877⟆419⟅3468 be prepared for long hold times,
response.title: How to Cancel Norton LifeLock Subscription ?
